messages.content: can you check the image and just let me know what you get do not do anything just let me know what is there

I cannot directly analyze images or see your screen. To help you identify what's in an image file, I have two options:

1. If you have an image file in your current directory (/Users/ajitprajapati/Projects/CurryCrave), I can run a command to get basic information about it:

[RUN_CMD]
file *

2. For actual image analysis/description, you'll need to use an external AI service:

[NEED_EXTERNAL]
Describe what you see in this image: [paste your image here]

Which approach would you prefer?
